documentation:
C++ Linalg
==========

This package contains a linear algebra based simulator for quantum circuits, ``CLinalg``, which backend is written in
C++.


Installation
------------

You can use pip to install this package:

```bash
pip install myqlm-clinalg
```

Documentation
-------------

Check out [the online documentation](https://myqlm.github.io/04_api_reference/module_qat/module_qpus/%3Amyqlm%3Aclinalg.html).
